name: HWM_TM_REC_GRP
description: A grouping of time records, for example, a day groups time records occuring within that day.  A time card groups day time record groups.

columns.Name: TM_REC_GRP_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key column containing a random generated number.  This column is not updateable.

columns.Name: ORIG_TM_REC_GRP_ID
columns.Comments: ORIG_TM_REC_GRP_ID : foreign key to retrieve original time record group row

columns.Name: ORIG_TM_REC_GRP_VERSION
columns.Comments: ORIG_TM_REC_GRP_VERSION : Foreign Key column containing the version of the original time building block.

columns.Name: TM_REC_GRP_VERSION
columns.Comments: Primary Key column containing the current version of the time building block.  This column is not updateable.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: GRP_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key

columns.Name: COMMIT_TIMESTAMP
columns.Comments: Used to find the latest Commit Time.  The same value will be stored in Consumers who deal with repository to  verify if the ID they are having is the latest TRG

columns.Name: MEASURE
columns.Comments: The measure value of the time building block.

columns.Name: LAYER_TM_REC_GRP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to a Time Record Group Id in a different layer(Example Raw to Calc Link - if we expec them to be many like this then we should have a usages table).

columns.Name: LAYER_TM_REC_GRP_VERSION
columns.Comments: Foreign key to a TimeRecord Group in a different layer

columns.Name: UNIT_OF_MEASURE
columns.Comments: The units corresponding to the Measure.  HOURS

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: For Range type of building blocks, the start time of the block.

columns.Name: STOP_TIME
columns.Comments: For Range type of building blocks, the stop time of the block.

columns.Name: PARENT_TM_REC_GRP_ID
columns.Comments: The building block id for the parent block in the time structure hierarchy.

columns.Name: PARENT_TM_REC_GRP_VERSION
columns.Comments: The building block version for the parent block in the time structure hierarchy.

columns.Name: USER_STATUS
columns.Comments: USER_STATUS

columns.Name: DELETE_FLAG
columns.Comments: DELETE_FLAG

columns.Name: LAYER_CODE
columns.Comments: LAYER_CODE

columns.Name: COMMENT_TEXT
columns.Comments: Notes for communicating additional information about the time.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: The resource for which the time building block applies.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of resource, such as a person.

columns.Name: SUBRESOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: SUBRESOURCE_ID

columns.Name: TIME_REPORTER_ID
columns.Comments: The person who reported the time

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Start date of row

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: End date of row

columns.Name: ORDER_ENTERED
columns.Comments: ORDER_ENTERED

columns.Name: TCSMR_SET_ID
columns.Comments: The set of Time Consumers that will process this block.  This set of Time Consumers is a subset of the Time Consumers covered the the TCSMR_CONFIG_SET_ID.

columns.Name: TCSMR_CONFIG_SET_ID
columns.Comments: The configuration of time consumers to be used when processing this block

columns.Name: DATA_SET_ID
columns.Comments: Used for archiving

columns.Name: LATEST_VERSION
columns.Comments: Indicates if this is the most recent version of the time building block.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: START_TIMEZONE_CODE
columns.Comments: The time zone associated to the start time.

columns.Name: STOP_TIMEZONE_CODE
columns.Comments: The time zone associated to the stop time.

columns.Name: START_GMT_OFFSET
columns.Comments: The number of hours the start time is offset from GMT.

columns.Name: STOP_GMT_OFFSET
columns.Comments: The number of hours the stop time is offset from GMT.

columns.Name: ZONE_TYPE
columns.Comments: A code to indicate if the time is associated to a zone or an offset.

columns.Name: PART_DATE
columns.Comments: partition key

indexes.Columns: RESOURCE_ID, LATEST_VERSION, NVL("DELETE_FLAG",'N'), GRP_TYPE_ID, START_TIME, STOP_TIME
